zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Bigod於大約1438年出生在英國越可爾澤特林頓時，她的父親Sir Ralph Bigod29歲，母親Anne Greystoke27歲。她和William Conyers Esq.至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1531年1月9日在英國享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Bigod于大约1438年出生在英国越可爾澤特林頓时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Bigod29岁，母亲Anne Greystoke27岁。她和William Conyers Esq.至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1531年1月9日在英国享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Bigod was born about 1438, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Bigod, was 29 and her mother, Anne Greystoke, was 27. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with William Conyers Esq.. She died on 9 January 1531, in England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Bigod est née environ 1438, à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Bigod, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Greystoke, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec William Conyers Esq.. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1531, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Bigod um 1438 in Settrington, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Bigod 29 und ihre Mutter Anne Greystoke 27. Sie hatte mit William Conyers Esq. mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1531 im Alter von 94 Jahren in England.

Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con William Conyers Esq.. Morì il 9 gennaio 1531, nel England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Bigodが約1438年にイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Bigodは29歳，母Anne Greystokeは27歳であった。彼女はWilliam Conyers Esq.との間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1531年1月9日にイギリスで94歳で死去した。

ko.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 세트링턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Bigod(이)가 대략 1438년 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Bigod(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Greystoke(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 William Conyers Esq.(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 1월 9일 영국에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com William Conyers Esq.. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1531, em Inglaterra, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Bigod родилась около 1438 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Bigod было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Greystoke, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от William Conyers Esq. Она умерла 9 января 1531 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 94 лет.
